name: Landing
description: Library component. The landing ceremony -- orchestrates worktree cleanup before a convoy can reach its terminal landed state. Sends CLEAN to each worktree, observes their completion, reports Done. Per cmd/convoy.go:1243-1255: phase 1 is worktree cleanup, phase 2 is convoy close, phase 3 is notifications. This component covers phase 1.

CLEAN1.description: sends Clean to the first worktree. Tagged 'Clean'.

CLEAN2.description: sends Clean to the second worktree. Tagged 'Clean'.

CONVOY_OBSERVE.description: observes convoy state to know when to start cleanup. Fires on Closed (normal) or ForceLandPending (force path).

actors.name: Landing
actors.owner: Cleanup ceremony. Idle until convoy reaches Closed or ForceLandPending. Fires CLEAN to each worktree sequentially, waits for each to report Cleaned via observe, then Done.

triples.event: convoy ready for cleanup: start wt1
